_description: Asset manifest for StyleGAN HF demo — Phase 2 fixed version. All paths relative to hf_space_demo root.

faces.fallback_behavior: create_fallback_placeholder() renders a dark gradient card with text
faces.source_hint: Run python downloader.py — pulls from thispersondoesnotexist-style sources

psi_low.fallback_behavior: get_real_face(3) — a conservatively-selected pool face used as proxy
psi_low.description: A photorealistic, unremarkable face representing low-ψ output (average-looking)
psi_low.source_hint: Manually select face index 3 from your 50-face pool, or source from FFHQ gallery

psi_mid.description: A balanced, distinct but photorealistic face representing ψ=0.7 sweet spot
psi_mid.source_hint: Manually select face index 22 from your 50-face pool

psi_high.description: A face with distinctive/unusual features representing high-ψ extrapolation
psi_high.source_hint: Manually select face index 41 from your 50-face pool, or use a StyleGAN2 high-psi sample

mix_matrix.fallback_behavior: Image compositing proxy runs with honest disclosure label shown to user
mix_matrix.description: Figure 3 from Karras et al. CVPR 2019 — 4×4 grid of style-mixed faces. PRIMARY visual for Tab 3.
mix_matrix.source_hint: Extract from StyleGAN paper PDF Section 3 (page 5). Crop to just the grid. Resize to ~900×300 for 3-column display. Or run real StyleGAN2 inference with mixing enabled.
mix_matrix.ideal_size: 900×300 or any aspect that fits the 3-column Gradio layout

interp_strip.fallback_behavior: Button loads nothing (returns None gracefully) — Gradio shows empty image with no crash
interp_strip.description: 5-frame horizontal strip showing true W-space interpolation: α=0.0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1.0. Must be a realistic face at midpoint, NOT a ghost double-exposure.
interp_strip.source_hint: Most impactful asset to source. Options: (1) rosinality/stylegan2-pytorch interpolation video frame capture. (2) NVlabs stylegan2 with --generate-images --truncation-psi=0.7. (3) Screenshot from a runwayml or Hugging Face inference demo.

v1_artifact.fallback_behavior: _add_blob_artifacts() applies computed blobs at anatomically-correct zones (chin/ear/hair)
v1_artifact.description: A StyleGAN1 output showing real water-droplet / blob artifacts. Blobs should appear at chin, ear boundaries, hair region — NOT on nose or eyes.
v1_artifact.source_hint: Google 'StyleGAN1 water droplet artifact' Images. Or run early StyleGAN1 checkpoint. Karras 2019 paper Fig. 1 shows examples.

v2_clean.fallback_behavior: get_real_face(7) — clean face from pool used directly as V2 output
v2_clean.description: A clean StyleGAN2 output face with no artifacts — paired with v1_artifact if possible (same seed/latent but different V1 vs V2 checkpoint).
v2_clean.source_hint: NVlabs/stylegan2 official checkpoint FFHQ-1024 or any clean HF Space output

v3_comparison.fallback_behavior: _make_v3_description_card() creates an informative text card — NO pixel shift used
v3_comparison.description: Optional: a visual from Karras et al. NeurIPS 2021 Figure 1 showing alias-free equivariance, or a side-by-side still of StyleGAN2 vs StyleGAN3 outputs. If not present, the description card is used instead.
v3_comparison.source_hint: Karras 2021 NeurIPS paper Figure 1. Or stylegan3 GitHub page header comparison.
v3_comparison.warning: Do NOT use np.roll image shifting — it shows face offset in frame, which is WRONG for alias-free concept. Only use a real comparison image or the text card fallback.

noise_variants.fallback_behavior: Gaussian noise applied to same face at 3 intensity levels as proxy — labeled 'Simulated B variation'
noise_variants.description: Pre-generated face variants: same seed (same W / identity) but different stochastic noise B injection. 3 files per seed. Ideal seeds to pre-generate: 7, 10, 22, 42.
noise_variants.source_hint: Run StyleGAN2 inference with fixed seed but noise_mode='random' three times: python generate.py --seeds=7 --noise-mode=random (repeat 3x, rename outputs). Requires an NVlabs StyleGAN2 environment or rosinality fork.

summary.note: All fallbacks produce a non-crashing, honest output. The demo works fine with only assets/faces/ populated.
